title: Official Information Act 1982 — New Zealand Information Access and Privacy
description: New Zealand legislation establishing frameworks for public access to official information, personal information rights, and information withholding criteria. Defines procedures for requesting access to government documents, reasons for refusal, and ombudsman review mechanisms. Critical for organizations handling NZ government data and complying with transparency and privacy obligations.
